description: NIST Building 423 IAQ Manufactured House DAQ - Configuration Template
project_name: Building 423 IAQ Manufactured House - Data Acquisition and Backup System
_setup_instructions: 1. Copy this file to 'data_config.json' in the repository root
2. Replace all YOUR_* placeholders with your actual values
3. Verify all network paths are accessible before running scripts
4. Sensitive data (API keys, tokens): use environment variables, NOT this file
5. Keep data_config.json in .gitignore — each deployment maintains its own copy

local_sources.description: Local desktop source folders on DAQ computer — EDIT THESE PATHS

indoor_daq.description: Task Logger output (indoor DAQ data from cDAQ-9178 chassis)

outdoor_weather.description: Met One AIO2 weather station data via serial logger

remote_destinations.description: Network storage destinations — EDIT THESE PATHS

mission.description: Primary backup location - Mission network drive (all data, all dates)

epa_shower.description: EPA Shower project backup - selected year only (TEMPORARY)
epa_shower.notes: Temporary backup for EPA Shower project — remove this section when project concludes

thermostat.description: Ecobee thermostat data backup - daily 5-minute interval CSVs
thermostat._thermostat_id_note: Thermostat ID can also be set via ECOBEE_THERMOSTAT_ID environment variable (takes priority over this value)

_environment_variables.description: These environment variables can override values in this config file
_environment_variables.TARGET_DATE_OVERRIDE: YYYY-MM-DD — forces ecobee_thermostat_backup.py to fetch a specific past date (backfill)

_path_format_note: Windows network paths in JSON require double backslashes: \\\\server\\share\\folder
Python normalizes forward and backward slashes, so either works in practice

instruments._note: Document active instruments here — used for reference and future scripting. Not required by backup scripts.

AIO2.description: Met One AIO 2 Sonic Weather Sensor
notes: Sensor installed on MET Tower. Data logged via serial output.

Setra_264.description: Setra Model 264 Very Low Differential Pressure Transducer
notes: List channel assignments here once reconnected.

Vaisala_HMP155.description: Vaisala HUMICAP HMP155 Humidity and Temperature Probe
notes: Replace serial numbers and calibration dates with actual values.

Vaisala_HMP45A.description: Vaisala HUMICAP HMP45A Humidity and Temperature Probe
notes: Legacy sensors — planned replacement with HMP155.

Ecobee4.connection: Wi-Fi 802.11 b/g/n (2.4 GHz) — Ecobee Cloud API
notes: Data retrieved via Ecobee Runtime Report API.
Thermostat ID used in remote_destinations.thermostat.thermostat_id must match this device.

future_instruments._note: Document planned but not-yet-installed instruments here.

Thermocouple.description: Type T Thermocouples via NI 9213 Module

daq_system._note: Document DAQ chassis and module configuration here.

config_utilities.description: Helper information for scripts loading this config

python_setup.example: import json; from pathlib import Path; config = json.load(open('data_config.json'))
python_setup.recommended_location: Place data_config.json in the script's directory or project root

environment_variables.description: For sensitive data (API keys, tokens), use environment variables

examples.TARGET_DATE_OVERRIDE: YYYY-MM-DD date string — forces ecobee_thermostat_backup.py to backfill a specific day

notes: All paths can use either forward slashes (/) or backslashes (\\) - Python normalizes them
Network paths must be accessible before backup runs
Create data_config.json from data_config.template.json and customize for your system
Do NOT commit data_config.json with real paths to the repository
